title: Analog Audio
description: Bring the warm comfort of analog audio mediums to your world! Integrates with Create Aeronautics, Sable, Voice Chat, and more!
body:
# Analog Audio
<center>

![Mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/381e286e89cb0e3654e442169ce120fdcb7394a9.png)


[![Only on Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d1d27875b514436a46f3ec4e998d82b5a4a24b1_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/analog-audio)
</center>

## Features
![Cassette deck feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a80e6bbbc939fa6d37e4f76f47cfb0ff70c7089c.png)
![Radio feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af792569ced50bea3bbfc7cb890bf431f6e757e4.png)
![Cassette feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10a7fc981bf7867b445d931fba5d42e2704e1984.png)
[![Simple voice chat support!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b335359db940ffa201cea4c419155cfa2f163b3.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
![Walkie talkie feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f2d1889e5ea23561591745e7a6db41e3414ee84.png)
![Speaker feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f3058ab9404b2728d160bf4c447bcf63f5a0491.png)

## Mod Integration
<details>
  <summary>Click to expand</summary>

## 1.21.1+
  - ## [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
    - Radio blocks will provide accurate positional audio with create contraptions and trains.
  - ## [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics)
    - Radio blocks will provide accurate positional audio with sable contraptions and vehicles.
    - *(with [SVC](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat))* Speaker blocks will provide accurate positional audio with sable contraptions and vehicles.
## 1.20.1+
  - ## [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
    *For the best experience, it's recommended that you disable `enable_groups` in your simple voice chat config and use walkie talkies instead.*
 
    - **Walkie Talkies** will transmit your voice to other walkie talkies and speakers on the same frequency.
    - **Speaker Blocks** will broadcast incoming transmissions of walkie talkies on its same frequency.
</details>

## Known Issues
<details>
  <summary>Click to expand</summary>

  - Speaker blocks do not work in Create contraptions. They ***do*** still work in [**Create Aeronautics**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) contraptions.
 </details>

<center>

 ## Join us. Thrive.
[![The Playground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1da14c54b0a74c16ba2e1e250f4cc46b5e359b4.png)](https://discord.gg/Fuuxaq6KPh)
</center>
